title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Sika India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Sika India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Sika India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sika India:
Sika India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sika India!
